name: HCGenerate ES (Extra Strength)
ingredients: Fadogia agrestis, Bulbine natalensis, Urtica dioica, Fenugreek extract, Maca extract, Zinc, Vitamin E, Mucuna pruriens (L-DOPA)
mapped_cas_ids: CAS-ANDRO-04, CAS-ANDRO-05, CAS-ANDRO-03, CAS-ANDRO-06, CAS-ANDRO-07, CAS-MIN-01, CAS-ANTIOX-01, CAS-NEURO-07
notes: Previously used by Captain with strong libido/drive recovery; no longer available so deconstructed into CAS components.

name: Edovis
ingredients: L-Citrulline, Maca Andina, Muira puama, Damiana, Tribulus terrestris
notes: Blend overlapping with existing CAS agents; may be used occasionally but individual compounds preferred for control.

name: Endotelon 150 mg (procyanidolic oligomers)
quality_rating: High (standardized Rx/OTC venotonic; clinical use in CVI)
notes: Typical dosing reported: 1 tab AM + 1 tab PM (20 days/month) for venous symptoms; consider 150–300 mg/day. Monitor bruising if combined with aspirin/omega-3.
